description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, slightly bulging body constructed from vertically aligned wooden staves. The exterior is reinforced by three evenly spaced, wide metal hoops that encircle the barrel horizontally, providing structural integrity and a rustic appearance. The wood has a dark, weathered finish, showing subtle grain patterns and natural imperfections, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The top is open, revealing a hollow interior, and there are no visible handles or lids. The metal bands are matte gray, contrasting with the deep brown of the wood. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storage or decorative use in urban or rustic settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with three matte gray metal hoops and an open top, featuring a bulging cylindrical shape and dark wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, three metal hoops, and the full curvature of the wooden staves.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the barrel's bulge and the texture of the wood and metal bands.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the symmetry of the metal hoops and the even distribution of the wood staves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features, showing the consistent weathered wood and metal banding.
